response.title: Advanced Surgical Techniques Workshop
response.shortBlurb: A comprehensive 2-day hands-on workshop covering advanced surgical techniques for senior practitioners.
response.learningObjectives: Learn advanced suturing techniques, minimally invasive procedures, and post-operative care protocols.

segments.topicDetails: Overview of advanced suturing methods with live demonstrations
Best practices for patient monitoring and recovery

response.title: Telemedicine and Remote Patient Care
response.shortBlurb: Master the essentials of telemedicine, virtual consultations, and remote patient monitoring.
response.learningObjectives: Understand best practices for virtual consultations, digital health tools, and remote monitoring systems.

segments.topicDetails: Overview of popular telemedicine software and setup
Effective communication and examination techniques online
Using wearables and monitoring devices for patient care
